case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. GREEN HORIZON GLOBAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN HORIZON GLOBAL, INC. $65,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,659.77 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $68,309.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
